summary: Full testing of Discogs-sourced Variant Rarity Score system completed. All 11 backend API tests pass (100%), frontend UI verification passes. Rarity data correctly sourced from Discogs community stats (community_have, community_want, num_for_sale).
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: /api/vinyl/chappell-roan/pink-pony-club/baby-pink returns rarity object with Discogs fields: score=3, tier='Common', discogs_owners=8949, discogs_wantlist=1027, listings_available=72
PASS: /api/vinyl/rarity/31785674 returns same Discogs-sourced data with discogs_id, artist, album, variant metadata
PASS: /api/vinyl/rarity/30984958 (Charli XCX Brat) returns tier='Uncommon' (score=4) - different from Chappell Roan 'Common'
PASS: /api/vinyl/rarity/33762579 (BORNS) returns tier='Very Rare' (score=10) with 71 owners, 0 listings
PASS: /api/vinyl/rarity/99999999 handles nonexistent release gracefully (returns 200, no 500 error)
PASS: Rarity score calculation verified: _owner_score(8949)=1, _demand_score(1027,8949)=1, _supply_score(72)=1 = total 3 = Common
PASS: Frontend /vinyl/charli-xcx/brat/black-translucent shows RarityCard with 'UNCOMMON' pill, Discogs Owners: 4,204, Discogs Wantlist: 516, Listings Available: 73
PASS: Frontend /vinyl/chappell-roan/pink-pony-club/baby-pink shows RarityCard with 'COMMON' tier
PASS: RarityCard labels correctly display 'Discogs Owners', 'Discogs Wantlist', 'Listings Available' (not Honeygroove-specific labels)
test_credentials: No auth required - vinyl variant pages and rarity endpoint are public
context_for_next_testing_agent: Variant Rarity Score system fully tested with Discogs-sourced data. Backend endpoints /api/vinyl/{artist}/{album}/{variant} and /api/vinyl/rarity/{discogs_id} both return rarity object with Discogs community stats. Frontend RarityCard component renders correctly with data-testid='rarity-card', data-testid='rarity-pill', data-testid='rarity-owners', data-testid='rarity-wantlist', data-testid='rarity-listings'. Test records: Chappell Roan Pink Pony Club [31785674] = Common, Charli XCX Brat [30984958] = Uncommon, BORNS [33762579] = Very Rare.
